judgement_smells.finding: canonical JSON SHA-256 logic is duplicated across the two modules
judgement_smells.impact: future canonicalization drift is possible, but the frozen card prohibited editing shared modules in this implementation slice

rejected_candidates: evaluator diagnostic validation errors are intentionally converted into failed coordinates by the frozen card
source_actor denotes candidate provenance and is not constrained to the top-level execution actor enum
projected record creator is research_agent while source_actor is preserved separately, as required
pair identifiers without a single-instance artifact are intentionally excluded from archive artifacts

findings.title: scientific outcome identity does not bind projected evidence metadata
findings.detail: The diagnostic identity includes behavior_profile_hash but omits counterexample artifacts, gap and classification fields that the projector later persists. Those fields can change while outcome_sha256 remains unchanged.
findings.required_correction: bind a canonical validated complete-summary evidence identity into each diagnostic and the outcome hash

findings.title: complete summaries are insufficiently validated before becoming feedback and memory evidence
findings.detail: Validation checks candidate and scope but does not freeze regime and pair keys, hash formats, finite numeric values, counterexample schema, or forbidden raw-looking metadata. Free-form fields are then interpolated into the fixed template and projected records.
findings.required_correction: validate the complete frozen summary schema and reject raw-looking, non-finite, unknown-key or malformed evidence before caching or projection

findings.title: cache hits can inherit a different candidate source_actor
findings.detail: The exact cache key excludes source_actor and cache-hit validation does not compare it. Identical code hashes presented with different provenance can reuse the first cached attribution.
findings.required_correction: include source_actor in the exact cache identity or deterministically rebind and rehash the returned diagnostic after validating all scientific fields

findings.title: failed diagnostics may omit the required failure message hash
findings.detail: Failed status requires failure_type but accepts failure_message_hash=null, weakening the frozen failure identity and cache audit trail.
findings.required_correction: require a lowercase SHA-256 failure_message_hash for every failed diagnostic

findings.title: exact objective ties are excluded from the frozen near-tie trigger
findings.detail: The predicate requires a positive difference even though the frozen trigger is an absolute difference at most 0.01 for another non-best candidate.
findings.required_correction: identify the best candidate by stable identity and allow zero objective difference for a distinct candidate

confirmed_invariants: disabled policy returns before checkpoint, cache, or evaluator access
full symmetric budget is checked before cache and evaluator access
complete and failed exact-key entries are cached and cache hits are not retried
a failed coordinate does not stop later coordinates
failed coordinates retain candidate, regime and pair coordinates
projection is development-scoped and uses a bounded fixed sentence structure
